session.user:
Run these commands sequentially and report results. DO NOT modify any files.
1. `ruff format src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py` 2. `ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py` 3. `ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py tests/commands/one_shot/test_one_shot_outside_repo.py`
Report all errors and output.

session.assistant:
## Summary
**Command 1 (ruff format):** Passed - 3 files reformatted - 3 files left unchanged
**Command 2 (ruff check):** Failed - 1 error found: Import block is un-sorted or un-formatted in `tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py` at line 3 - Error code: I001 (import sorting) - Fixable with `--fix` option
**Command 3 (ruff format --check):** Passed - All 6 files already properly formatted
**Error Details:**
File: `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/test_one_shot_api.py`
The import block starting at line 3 is unsorted/unformatted: ```python import base64 import json
from unittest.mock import patch
from erk.cli.commands.one_shot_api import ( api_commit_file, api_create_branch, api_get_branch_sha, api_get_default_branch, gh_env_for_nwo, ) ```
This is a fixable issue that ruff can resolve with the `--fix` flag.
